---
title: "SubtleSentinel"
---

```{ojs}
// 1. Load, making sure timestamps are represented by JS Date
data_cleaned = FileAttachment("data.json").json().then(d => d.map(row => ({
  ...row,
  timestamp: new Date(row.timestamp)
})))

// Data filtering example: filter for high threat levels
high_threats = data_cleaned.filter(d => d.threat_level > 4)

// 3. Render a simple test chart
Plot.plot({
  marks: [
    Plot.lineY(data_cleaned, {x: "timestamp", y: "threat_level", stroke: "source"}),
    Plot.dot(data_cleaned, {x: "timestamp", y: "threat_level", stroke: "source"})
  ]
})
```
